ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Teacher's last name */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Teacher's first name */,
  "voice_mail_ext" TEXT /* Voice mail extension for the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher's department */,
  "contact_preference" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., voice mail, email, in-person) */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the teacher's office */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the teacher is currently active */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the teacher's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Student's last name */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Student's first name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Student's major */,
  "class_year" TEXT /* Student's class year (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student is currently active */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the student's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "appointment_location" TEXT /* Location of the appointment */,
  "appointment_comments" TEXT /* Comments or special instructions for the appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., Scheduled, Confirmed, Cancelled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the appointment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_email" TEXT /* Email address of the department head */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher teaching the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "syllabus_link" TEXT /* Link to the course syllabus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., Active, Dropped) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the enrollment */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade achieved by the student */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided to the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the grade was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the grade */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date when the grade was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the enrollment */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of the attendance record */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of the attendance (e.g., Present, Absent) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attendance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the attendance record */,
  "late" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student was late */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_link" TEXT /* Link to access the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., Lecture Notes, Lab Manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "announcements" (
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each announcement */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "announcement_title" TEXT /* Title of the announcement */,
  "announcement_body" TEXT /* Body of the announcement */,
  "announcement_date" TEXT /* Date when the announcement was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the announcement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the announcement */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Indicates if the announcement is important */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcements_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)
